query: INSERT INTO queue_state (id, version, queue_json, current_queue_index, progress_secs, shuffle_order_json, shuffle_enabled) VALUES (1, ?1, ?2, ?3, ?4, ?5, ?6) ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET version=?1, queue_json=?2, current_queue_index=?3, progress_secs=?4, shuffle_order_json=?5, shuffle_enabled=?6
